introductoryCutscene.text: Initialized dialogue extension./p Press Z to continue./eWelcome-/l to Exelsior's World./eBut you may be wondering, just what kind of world is this?/eSome may call it ugly, or wrong, or cruel.../phowever../eBeauty is in the eye of the beholder./pAlthough you are not that./eBut you may become the beholder, if you have what it takes to question the nature of reality./eBut for now,/l you must work./e/!00
